---
title: "Mean field models — hands on"
subtitle: "Session 2a · Defining a FAIR brain network model"
jupyter: python3
---

## Goals

- TODO: pick a mean-field model from TVB
- TODO: inspect parameters and state variables
- TODO: simulate a single node and visualise dynamics

## Setup

```{python}
# TODO: imports
```

## Inspect the model

```{python}
# TODO: instantiate model, print parameter table
```

## Simulate a single node

```{python}
# TODO: short simulation, plot time series
```

## Exercises

- TODO: vary one parameter and describe the qualitative change
- TODO: compare two mean-field models on the same input
